case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SERGIO WILL et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILL, SERGIO $4,814.37 PRINCIPAL, $893.42 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,956.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
